translations.When enabled, always expands the absolut: When enabled, always expands the absolute newest message in a thread regardless of folder. When disabled (default), inbox expands the last received message and sent expands the last sent message.

translations.Set the number of inactive days after wh: Set the number of inactive days after which event Talk conversations are automatically deleted. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Defines the default number of days after: Defines the default number of days after which messages are automatically deleted, unless overridden by specific folder rules. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Set how many days messages can remain in: Set how many days messages can remain in the Inbox before they are automatically deleted. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Set how many days sent messages are kept: Set how many days sent messages are kept before being automatically deleted. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Set how many days processed messages are: Set how many days processed messages are kept before being automatically deleted. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Set how many days deleted messages remai: Set how many days deleted messages remain in the Trash before being permanently removed. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Set how many days draft messages are kep: Set how many days draft messages are kept before being automatically deleted. Use 0 to disable automatic deletion.
translations.Manually trigger retention cleanup to de: Manually trigger retention cleanup to delete messages older than the configured retention periods.

translations.Compose the HTML email body for the invi:
Compose the HTML email body for the invitation. Available placeholders:

• #INVITATION_LINK (required) - Meeting invitation link
• #TITLE - Event title
• #DESCRIPTION - Event description
• #DATE_AND_TIME - Formatted date and time
• #ACCEPT_LINK - Accept invitation link
• #DECLINE_LINK - Decline invitation link
